summary.finding: Live v0.4.0 run, blind cross-model judge. On gpt-5.5 (medium) the skill lifts behavior quality 88.2 -> 92.1 (+3.9), concentrated in trace completeness and ask-gating. On gpt-5.4-mini (low) the same skill hurts, 75.0 -> 64.5 (-10.5): the heavy instructions overload a small model. The skill is built for capable models. 32/32 unit tests green.

phases.A: Domain expansion — 7 new packs, 10-domain routing in SKILL.md and playbook.md
phases.B: Memory bootstrap — creates semantic.md, episodic.md, procedural.md at install time
phases.C: Non-technical UX — QUICKSTART.md, plain-language output rule
phases.D: Context hook — injects today date and working directory on every prompt
phases.E: Benchmark expansion — 20 scenarios, v0.4.0 tag, package.json bump, live blind benchmark runner
